subcodes.first_line: This Book have We sent down in truth for those who have discerned the fragrance of the Beloved as it wafted betwixt the heavens and the earth, that they may be drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق لمن وجد عرف المحبوب اذ فاح بین السموات و الارضین لیجذبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
